_meta.description: Priority rules for resolving domain/intent conflicts

intent_priority.description: Intent routing priority - STRICT PRECEDENCE ORDER (index 0 = highest priority)

precedence_rules.description: When same keyword appears in multiple intents, highest-priority intent wins

STRONG.description: High-signal keywords can determine intent independently

MEDIUM.description: Need additional signal to confirm intent

NEGATIVE.description: Explicitly routes AWAY from this intent

domain_priority.description: Domain routing priority (higher = stronger signal). NOTE: Excel removed - now FILE_ACTIONS.excel intent

_excel_migration.reason: Excel is HOW data is accessed, not WHAT kind of knowledge

domain_vs_intent.rule: Intent determines WHAT to do, domain determines HOW to do it
domain_vs_intent.example: Legal extraction = EXTRACTION intent + LEGAL domain context

negative_trigger_rules.description: If negative signals >= threshold, exclude that domain

cross_domain_exclusions.description: Domains that should not co-occur in routing

fallback_hierarchy.description: Default routing when no strong signals
